body: Hi Suresh, I've prepared a draft for the corporate bulk thali package we discussed. It highlights your top services and includes a clear booking link. Reply REVIEW to see the draft, or EDIT to make changes.
Hi Padma, I've prepared a draft for the kids yoga summer camp we discussed. It highlights your top services and includes a clear booking link. Reply REVIEW to see the draft, or EDIT to make changes.
Hi Aditya, Karim from Karim's Salon here. Just a quick reminder about your appointment tomorrow. Reply CONFIRM to confirm your slot, or RESCHEDULE if you need a new time.
Hi Riya, Renu from Beauty Lounge by Renu here. Just a quick reminder about your appointment tomorrow. Reply CONFIRM to confirm your slot, or RESCHEDULE if you need a new time.
Hi Ramesh, With summer 2026 approaching, demand is shifting. Want me to suggest the top 3 items to move to the front of your shelves based on current Malviya Nagar trends? Reply YES.
Dr. Meera, There's an upcoming CDE opportunity: 'IDA Delhi: Digital impressions — 2026 state of the art'. It's free. Should I add a reminder to your calendar? Reply YES to add.

Hi Mr. Sharma, Ramesh from Apollo Health Plus Pharmacy here. Our records show your supply of metformin, atorvastatin, telmisartan runs out around 2026-04-28. We can deliver your refill to your saved address today. Reply REFILL to process.

Hi Vivaan, Dr. Dr. Sameer from Bright Smile Dental here. Our records show your supply of your medications runs out around soon. We can deliver your refill to your saved address today. Reply REFILL to process.

Dr. Meera, Heads up: Smile Studio just opened 1.3km away in Lajpat Nagar, offering Dental Cleaning @ ₹199. Should we counter with a targeted campaign highlighting your Dental Cleaning @ ₹299? Reply YES.

Hi Suresh, Heads up: A competitor just opened nearbykm away in Indiranagar, offering a special discount. Should we counter with a targeted campaign highlighting your Weekday Lunch Thali @ ₹149? Reply YES.
Hi Lakshmi, Just doing a quick pulse check. What service is most in-demand for you this week in Kapra? Reply with the service name and I'll optimize your profile for it.
Hi Suresh, Just doing a quick pulse check. What service is most in-demand for you this week in Indiranagar? Reply with the service name and I'll optimize your profile for it.
Hi Rashmi, Karthik from PowerHouse Fitness here. We noticed you haven't visited in over 57 days. We'd love to welcome you back with 3 FREE Trial Classes. Reply 1 to claim this offer, or 2 to opt-out.
Hi Reyansh, Dr. Dr. Asha from Asha Dental Care here. Hope you're doing well! Just a quick check-in since we haven't seen you recently. Reply YES if you'd like to book a quick session.
Hi Reyansh, Komal from Daily Care Medicos here. Hope you're doing well! Just a quick check-in since we haven't seen you recently. Reply YES if you'd like to book a quick session.
Hi Anjali, I haven't heard from you in 38 days. Just letting you know your profile in Aundh is running smoothly with 1200 views this month. Reply STATS for a full report.
Hi Anand, I haven't heard from you in 30 days. Just letting you know your profile in Sector 8 is running smoothly with 2189 views this month. Reply STATS for a full report.
Hi Lakshmi, Diwali is just 188 days away! Searches in Kapra are starting to pick up. Want me to schedule a festive promotion for Haircut @ ₹99? Reply YES.
Hi Pooja, the festival is just a few days away! Searches in Koramangala are starting to pick up. Want me to schedule a festive promotion for our special services? Reply YES.
Hi Vikas, Your Google Business Profile in Gomti Nagar is currently unverified, which limits your visibility. Verifying can boost traffic by ~30%. Want me to guide you through the process? Reply YES.

Hi Suresh, DC vs MI is tonight in Sant Nagar! Footfall usually drops 20% on match nights. Want me to blast a delivery offer for Buy 1 Pizza Get 1 Free (Tue-Thu) to your nearby customers? Reply YES to send.
Hi Suresh, Congratulations! You just hit 145 review_count on your profile. This boosts your ranking in Indiranagar. Want me to draft a 'Thank You' post for your customers? Reply YES.
Hi Mukesh, Congratulations! You just hit 100 reviews on your profile. This boosts your ranking in Aundh. Want me to draft a 'Thank You' post for your customers? Reply YES.
Dr. Bharat, Your calls dropped 50% this week (currently at 980 total). Don't worry, this is typical. Should we run a special promotion for our special services to counter the dip? Reply YES.
Hi Sushma, Your views dropped 0% this week (currently at 2547 total). Don't worry, this is typical. Should we run a special promotion for our special services to counter the dip? Reply YES.
Hi Padma, Great news! Your calls spiked by 15% this week in Mylapore. Want me to capture this momentum by asking recent visitors for a Google review? Reply YES.
Hi Vikas, Great news! Your calls spiked by 0% this week in Gomti Nagar. Want me to capture this momentum by asking recent visitors for a Google review? Reply YES.

Hi Priya, Dr. Meera from Dr. Meera's Dental Clinic here. It's been a while since your last visit. Your next session is due by 2026-11-12. We have a slot open on Wed 5 Nov, 6pm. Reply YES to lock it in.
Hi Diya, Padma from Zen Yoga Studio here. It's been a while since your last visit. Your next session is due by soon. We have a slot open on tomorrow. Reply YES to lock it in.
Dr. Meera, Important compliance update: DCI revised radiograph dose limits effective 2026-12-15 by 2026-12-15. Should I generate an updated SOP draft for your staff? Reply YES.
